languages.text: "Пожалуй. Я отдам все необходимые распоряжения относительно подготовки снаряжения и шаттлов к экстремальным условиям местного климата и буду ожидать вашей команды к высадке". {n}В тоне Эоганна слышится нескрываемое облегчение.{/n}

"I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Пожалуй. Я отдам все необходимые распоряжения относительно подготовки снаряжения и шаттлов к экстремальным условиям местного климата и буду ожидать вашей команды к высадке". {n}В тоне Эоганна слышится нескрываемое облегчение.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

"I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your orders." {n}Eo-gann's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

"I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your orders." {n}Eo-gann's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

"I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

languages.text: “您说得对。我会做好一切必要安排，准备好适应当地极端气候所需的装备与穿梭机，并静候您的登陆指令。”{n}伊奥贡没有掩饰他的如释重负。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “您说得对。我会做好一切必要安排，准备好适应当地极端气候所需的装备与穿梭机，并静候您的登陆指令。”{n}伊奥贡没有掩饰他的如释重负。{/n}

languages.text: «Supongo que tiene razón. Llevaré a cabo todos los preparativos para conseguir equipamiento y lanzaderas aptas para el clima extremo de la zona. Tras ello, esperaré a sus órdenes para el aterrizaje». {n}Eogunn no podría estar más aliviado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Supongo que tiene razón. Llevaré a cabo todos los preparativos para conseguir equipamiento y lanzaderas aptas para el clima extremo de la zona. Tras ello, esperaré a sus órdenes para el aterrizaje». {n}Eogunn no podría estar más aliviado.{/n}

languages.text: « Vous avez sans doute raison. Je vais nous procurer tout le matériel nécessaire, ainsi que des navettes adaptées au climat local extrême, et j'attendrai votre ordre de débarquer. » {n}Le soulagement dans la voix d'Eogunn est évident.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez sans doute raison. Je vais nous procurer tout le matériel nécessaire, ainsi que des navettes adaptées au climat local extrême, et j'attendrai votre ordre de débarquer. » {n}Le soulagement dans la voix d'Eogunn est évident.{/n}

languages.text: "Sanırım haklısınız. Yerel iklimin aşırı koşullarına uygun ekipmanlar ve mekikler hazırlanması için gerekli tüm düzenlemeleri yapıp gezegene inme emrini bekleyeceğim." {n}Eogunn'un ses tonunda apaçık bir rahatlama olduğu hissediliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sanırım haklısınız. Yerel iklimin aşırı koşullarına uygun ekipmanlar ve mekikler hazırlanması için gerekli tüm düzenlemeleri yapıp gezegene inme emrini bekleyeceğim." {n}Eogunn'un ses tonunda apaçık bir rahatlama olduğu hissediliyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich denke, Ihr habt recht. Ich werde alle erforderlichen Vorbereitungen treffen, für die extremen klimatischen Bedingungen geeignete Shuttles bereitstellen und auf weitere Befehle zur Landung warten." {n}Eogunn klingt ehrlich erleichtert.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your order to make planetfall." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich denke, Ihr habt recht. Ich werde alle erforderlichen Vorbereitungen treffen, für die extremen klimatischen Bedingungen geeignete Shuttles bereitstellen und auf weitere Befehle zur Landung warten." {n}Eogunn klingt ehrlich erleichtert.{/n}

languages.text: 「確かにそうかもしれません。私は、この地域の気候の厳しい条件に適した機器やシャトルの必要な準備をすべて整え、あなたの命令を待つことにします。」{n}エオガンの口調は、率直な安堵感に満ちている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I suppose you are right. I will make all necessary arrangements for equipment and shuttles suited for the extreme conditions of the local climate and will await your orders." {n}Eogunn's tone is one of naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「確かにそうかもしれません。私は、この地域の気候の厳しい条件に適した機器やシャトルの必要な準備をすべて整え、あなたの命令を待つことにします。」{n}エオガンの口調は、率直な安堵感に満ちている。{/n}
